prompt: 我从iPhone导出了健康数据，在apple_health_export目录里。帮我做一个深度的健康分析报告，重点看血糖和运动的关系。

assertions.name: glucose_deep_dive
assertions.description: Contains detailed glucose analysis with MAGE, MODD, TIR, LBGI/HBGI

assertions.name: glucose_exercise_correlation
assertions.description: Analyzes glucose-exercise relationship with causal inference

assertions.name: has_recommendations
assertions.description: Provides specific recommendations about glucose management
